source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're looking for one of our first Account Executives to drive full-cycle sales across enterprise and growth accounts. You'll be responsible for winning new customers while helping build the sales playbook from the ground up. This role is ideal for someone who brings a founder's mindset: taking initiative and helping shape everything from sales strategy to product feedback.

As a small and agile team, everyone wears multiple hats. We're looking for someone who will make a significant contribution to the company's success and long-term trajectory.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Revenue Growth. Manage the entire sales cycle — from initial outreach through contract execution — across both enterprise and growth-stage customers.

 - Sales Process Development. Create and refine scalable frameworks for discovery, qualification, technical validation, and procurement, ensuring future team members can build on a strong foundation.

 - Technical Conversations. Engage confidently with engineering leaders and technical stakeholders on integrations, authentication, system reliability, and build-versus-buy tradeoffs.

 - Internal Champions. Navigate complex buying committees by building relationships across engineering organizations and guiding opportunities through security, procurement, and approval processes.

 - Leadership Partnership. Partner closely with founders and GTM leadership on account planning, relationship-building, and strategic deal execution.

 - Product Direction. Serve as a critical voice of the customer, translating market feedback into insights that influence product development, positioning, and go-to-market strategy.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 5+ years of full-cycle B2B SaaS sales experience, including at least 2 years selling technical products to technical buyers. Experience with infrastructure, APIs, or data products is strongly preferred.

 - A proven history of consistently meeting or exceeding quota, including at least one role where you were among the top performers.

 - AI fluency. You use AI tools regularly in your work, understand the landscape, and can speak credibly with buyers who are building AI-powered products.

 - Technical confidence. You do not need to be an engineer, but you should be comfortable discussing deep integrations, APIs, OAuth, webhooks, and architectural tradeoffs with senior technical stakeholders.

 - Excellent communication skills, including strong writing ability and the ran

source_jobs.title: Founding Marketer
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.




THE ROLE

We're hiring our first dedicated Marketing hire — someone who will work directly alongside the CEO to build the brand, the content engine, and the go-to-market narrative from the ground up.

The CEO plans to do meaningful IC marketing work himself. This isn't a "hire someone and hand it off" situation, it's a genuine partnership. You'll own product marketing, drive content strategy, and build programs that create pipeline and establish Ampersand's position in a category that's still being defined.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Product Marketing — Own positioning, messaging, competitive differentiation, and go-to-market execution for a technical developer audience. Make the value legible to the people who need to buy it.

 - Content Engine — Build a technical content strategy: blog posts, guides, and educational material drawn from real customer use cases. Think long-form, useful, and earned — not volume plays.

 - Thought Leadership — Activate founder and team voices across social presence, newsletters, and industry channels. There are accounts ready to be built on — your job is to build them.

 - Demand Generation — Lead programs that drive awareness and pipeline, including developer conferences and executive dinners.

 - Website — Own the website so it speaks to customer problems, not just describes the product.

 - Sales Enablement — Build competitive talk tracks and collateral that make the GTM team sharper in the field.

 - CEO Partnership — Work directly alongside the CEO, who will be doing meaningful IC marketing work himself — this is a genuine creative collaboration, not a handoff.

 


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 4+ years in product marketing, growth marketing, or content marketing in a B2B environment

 - You've marketed to technical buyers: Engineers, VPs of Product, developer audiences — and understand how they think

 - Strong product marketing fundamentals: positioning, messaging, competitive differentiation, launch execution

 - Exceptional writing — you can make a technically complex product feel clear and worth paying attention to

 - You've built content that earns attention, not just fills a calendar

 - Comfortable being the first and only marketer — you build the system, not just run in it

 - Background in developer tools, APIs, infrastructure software, or AI products is strongly preferred





THE PERKS

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Free lunch o

source_jobs.title: Sales Engineer
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Sales Engineer to be the technical core of a GTM team that sells a complex, infrastructure-level product to buyers who know exactly what they're evaluating.

The buyers are engineers, CTOs, and product leaders. Demos are technical. Evaluations go deep. You'll partner closely with Account Executives to move deals forward, owning the technical side of the sales process from discovery through proof-of-concept and close. This is a role for someone who's credible with engineering audiences and genuinely enjoys the intersection of sales and engineering.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Technical Discovery — Go deep with prospective customers on their architecture, workflows, and integration requirements. Understand the real problem before proposing a solution.

 - Solution Design — Build tailored approaches that map Ampersand's capabilities to specific customer challenges.

 - Product Demonstrations — Lead technical demos and proof-of-concept engagements. Make the product's value tangible for buyers who want to see it work, not hear about it.

 - Technical Evaluation — Guide customers through architecture reviews, security discussions, implementation planning, and technical diligence requests.

 - Sales Partnership — Work side-by-side with AEs throughout the sales cycle. Win together.

 - Customer Advocacy — Bring what you hear in evaluations back to product and engineering. You're a signal source.

 - Enablement Materials — Build demo environments, reusable technical resources, and sales enablement content that scales the GTM team.

 


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3+ years in engineering, sales engineering, solutions engineering, or a similar technical role

 - Deep familiarity with APIs, integrations, cloud infrastructure, and modern software architectures

 - Experience working directly with technical buyers — engineers, product leaders, IT stakeholders

 - Strong presentation skills — you can hold a room of engineers and make them lean in

 - Experience supporting technical evaluations and POCs through enterprise sales cycles

 - A consultative instinct — you diagnose before you pitch

 - Experience with developer tools, infrastructure software, AI products, or enterprise platforms is a strong plus





THE PERKS

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Free lunch on in-office days (Mon/Tue/Thu)

 - 401(k) with company match, commuter benefits, HSA

 - Up to 4 weeks PTO

source_jobs.title: Customer Engineer
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Customer Engineer to serve as the technical backbone of our customer relationships, from first implementation through long-term success.

You'll work directly with technical customers to design and deploy solutions, solve complex integration challenges, and make sure they get real value from the platform. You're also the critical link between customers and the product team — the person who surfaces what's not working, what's needed next, and what's worth building. This is a role for someone who's technically sharp, genuinely enjoys working with customers, and takes ownership of outcomes, not just tasks.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Technical Support — Provide front-line technical support to engineering teams using Ampersand — answering questions in Slack and hopping on calls to troubleshoot live.

 - Customer Onboarding — Support onboarding from a technical perspective, from initial setup through a working implementation.

 - Escalation Management — Escalate issues to the core engineering team with the context required for a fast resolution — and own the loop until it's closed.

 - Product Feedback — Partner with the broader engineering team to identify product gaps, bugs, and recurring feature requests. Your perspective from the field matters.

 - Expert Partnership — Act as a thought partner and extended team member to customers — not just a support contact. Be the person who actually knows the product cold.

 - Tooling & Automation — Build tools and automations, and leverage AI to accelerate troubleshooting and reduce time-to-resolution.

 - Problem Solving — Dive into code and logs. Front-load as much solving as possible before escalating. Communicate with empathy, substance, and technical accuracy.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - Computer science degree, or 3+ years in solutions engineering, customer engineering, implementation, technical consulting, or developer support

 - Strong technical foundations — APIs, integrations, and modern software architectures aren't foreign to you

 - You dive into code and logs; you don't stop at the surface of a problem

 - You distill what the customer is saying, read between the lines, and ask follow-up questions that uncover the deeper issue

 - Clear communication across a range of audiences — junior engineer to VP of Engineering

 - A pattern-recognition instinct — you notice recurring problems and surface them proactively

 - Experience with APIs, integrations

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer to work directly inside customer environments, implementing and extending Ampersand in a way that makes each deployment succeed and teaches us something we can build on.

This role is part engineer, part technical advisor, part trusted partner. You'll work closely with strategic customers from kickoff through delivery, write production code when the work calls for it, and bring what you learn back to the core product and engineering team. If you enjoy working on challenges where no two implementations look the same, this could be a good role for you.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Customer Deployments — Lead end-to-end technical implementations with strategic customers, from discovery through successful adoption.

 - Technical Recommendations — Understand each customer's stack, integration goals, data model, and constraints — then advise on approaches that are maintainable, scalable, and easy for their team to operate long-term.

 - Production Code — Write production-quality code inside customer codebases when the work calls for it. You're comfortable in unfamiliar environments and hold a high bar for what you ship.

 - Engineering Partnership — Partner with the core engineering team to surface product gaps, bugs, and recurring implementation patterns from the field.

 - Knowledge Sharing — Turn customer-specific learnings into reusable improvements: docs, examples, playbooks, and direct product contributions.

 - Customer Partnership — Provide white-glove support and serve as a genuine thought partner to customer engineering and product teams — not just a vendor contact.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 4+ years of software engineering, solutions engineering, or customer-facing technical experience

 - Strong development fundamentals — you write production-quality code and are comfortable inside unfamiliar codebases

 - Direct experience working with customers to solve technical problems and deliver outcomes

 - Solid understanding of APIs, integrations, distributed systems, or cloud-based architectures

 - Clear communicator with both technical and non-technical stakeholders

 - You take responsibility for outcomes from discovery through delivery — not just your slice of the work

 - Experience with developer tools, infrastructure platforms, enterprise software, or AI-native products is a strong plus

 - Familiarity with CRM, ERP, fintech, or other business systems is a bonus

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer, Platform
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Product Engineer to shape the user experience of a platform used by some of the most technically sophisticated teams in software and AI.

This is a foundational role. You'll work closely with the founders, engineers, and customers to design experiences for complex, developer-facing workflows — and help establish the design standards the product will be built on from here. The team is small, the ownership is real, and the people you'll work with care deeply about craft. If you do your best work when the problems are hard and what you ship actually matters, then this is the environment for it.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Full Stack Feature Development — Own the full loop: technical architecture, implementation, documentation, and customer communication. No throwing work over the fence. You will primarily work in the backend (Golang), but you are also comfortable implementing frontend features (React).

 - Customer Engagement — Talk directly to customers — support questions, feedback gathering. Let what you hear shape what you build.

 - API Design and Architecture — Every engineer proposes API designs and technical architecture for the features they work on. We write succinct design docs, generously give each other feedback, and push towards the best solution.

 - Scale and Reliability — We are rapidly scaling our customer base, so we need to build with scale and edge cases in mind. Every engineer contributes to building alerting, telemetry, internal tooling, and automation to help us continue to ship fast while maintaining reliability.

 - AI Agents — In addition to our platform, we are building AI agents both of our own use and to ship to our customers. You will work on planning, tool use, evals, observability, guardrails, and the infrastructure needed to make agentic workflows reliable for customers.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 4+ years engineering and designing digital products, ideally in B2B SaaS, developer tools, enterprise software, or technical products

 - Golang and React experience is a strong plus

 - You are AI-forward and love trying new AI tools. You think of yourself not as a coder, but as a builder who harnesses AI to multiply their productivity.

 - Strong communication skills; you can articulate design decisions and push back when something isn't right. Engineers here write their own feature docs and own their decisions

 - Great taste in what makes developer tools intuitive; ideall

source_jobs.title: Product Engineer, Frontend
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Product Engineer to shape the user experience of a platform used by some of the most technically sophisticated teams in software and AI.

This is a foundational role. You'll work closely with the founders, engineers, and customers to design experiences for complex, developer-facing workflows — and help establish the design standards the product will be built on from here. The team is small, the ownership is real, and the people you'll work with care deeply about craft. If you do your best work when the problems are hard and what you ship actually matters, then this is the environment for it.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Dashboard — The dashboard is the command center that Ampersand customers go to to manage and troubleshoot their integrations. It serves engineers, product managers, and customer enablement teams. You will work on the dashboard experience, including how it looks, feels, and functions.

 - UI library — The Ampersand UI library is a set of embeddable React components and hooks that Ampersand customers put into their application for their customers to set up their integrations. Because it is a part of our customer’s product experiences and frontend stack, there are unique technical and UX challenges to ensure that it is composable, flexible and seamlessly fit into our user’s UI.

 - UI Prototyping — You have the freedom to come up with idea and rapidly prototype them using AI tools. You don’t need to wait for mocks or get buy in from a designer. You need to have great taste and intuition.

 - Customer Engagement — Talk directly to customers — user testing sessions, support questions, feedback gathering. Let what you hear shape what you build.

 - Full Stack Feature Development — Own the full loop: design, implementation, documentation, and customer communication. No throwing work over the fence. You are not afraid to dive into the backend and make PRs to unblock yourself.

 - Frontend Performance — Our dashboard is data-intensive, and you will work to ensure that the experience feels snappy and delightful.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 4+ years engineering and designing digital products, ideally in B2B SaaS, developer tools, enterprise software, or technical products

 - Strong React skills with full-stack range (bonus if you have a genuine willingness to go deep in Go on the backend)

 - You are AI-forward and love trying new AI tools. You think of yourself not as a coder, but as a builder

source_jobs.title: Founding Developer Relations
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Founding Developer Relations to build Ampersand's presence in the developer community — through content, education, and genuine engagement with the people building on the platform.

This is a technical role as much as it is a community role. You'll create tutorials, speak at events, engage in the communities where developers are already talking, and serve as a direct feedback loop between the developer ecosystem and the product team. Ampersand already has strong signals in the developer community — your job is to build on them intentionally.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Developer Documentation — Own the quality of Ampersand's developer docs. You're the editor in chief, even though all engineers contribute.

 - Technical Content — Create guides, tutorials, API references, sample apps, and troubleshooting content that developers actually use — not marketing dressed up as education.

 - Deep-Dive Content — Write technical blog posts that explain the Ampersand product, how we built certain features, and what engineers building integrations need to know.

 - Conference & Events — Source conferences for yourself and the CTO to speak at, apply to RFPs, and prepare decks and demos for accepted talks.

 - Developer Meetups — Work with the Founding Marketer to host regular developer community events.

 - Developer Advocacy — Dive into code to improve the onboarding experience end-to-end — whether that means updating a sign-up flow or fixing an API status code.

 


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3+ years in Developer Relations, developer advocacy, solutions engineering, or software engineering

 - Technical credibility — you can read and write code, and developer audiences will know it

 - Strong written and verbal communication; your content earns attention because it's genuinely useful

 - Experience creating technical content that developers actually use — not marketing dressed up as education

 - Comfortable presenting at conferences, webinars, or technical community events

 - A real interest in improving developer experience end-to-end, including the unglamorous parts

 - Experience with APIs, integrations, infrastructure products, or developer tooling is a strong plus





THE PERKS

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Free lunch on in-office days (Mon/Tue/Thu)

 - 401(k) with company match, commuter benefits, HSA

 - Up to 4 weeks PTO

 - Team socials and retreats

source_jobs.title: Engineering Manager
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're looking for an inaugural Engineering Manager to join a fast-growing AI infrastructure company at a pivotal moment. You'll work directly with the founders and a small, high-retention engineering team, including people who came up through Google, Meta, Cruise, and AWS and have chosen to stay. The culture here is intentional: high craft, high trust, and high ownership. Your job is to protect that while scaling it.

This is a hands-on role. You'll be close to the technical work, close to the people doing it, and close to the decisions that shape how the team grows. You will report directly to the co-founder and CTO, and this position has the opportunity to grow into a Director or VP of Engineering role down the road.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Engineering Leadership — Mentor and grow a high-performing team across full-stack, customer, and forward-deployed engineering. Run regular 1:1s, give clear feedback, and build the conditions where engineers do their best work and stay.

 - Team Scaling — Own onboarding for new engineers so they ramp quickly and become productive. Partner with founders on hiring and career development as the org grows beyond its founding core.

 - Technical Execution — Spend at least 20% of your time doing IC work — staying close to the codebase and tooling. Drive project management for customer deliverables, especially work that spans multiple engineers or product areas.

 - Engineering Acceleration — Create the environment and infrastructure for engineers to ship fast: code maintainability, internal documentation, development workflows, QA tools and automation. Lead by example on AI-accelerated development — advocate for using AI to improve velocity while maintaining reliability and quality.

 - Security & Compliance — Own security and compliance alongside our Founding Operations Lead, including SOC 2 Type 2, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and GDPR.

 - Distributed Collaboration — Manage project-based contract engineers and globally distributed connector contributors.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - Significant software engineering experience, including 2+ years leading engineering teams in a startup or high-growth environment (even if you didn’t hold a formal Manager title)

 - You've led teams through complex technical initiatives and are excited to do it again

 - Strong technical judgment — you can go deep on architecture and system design when it matters

 - You build engineering culture and systems:

source_jobs.title: Sales Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're looking for our first Sales Development Representative to take ownership of building top-of-funnel pipeline across enterprise and growth markets. You'll help shape how Ampersand shows up to prospects through thoughtful research, creative outreach, and genuine curiosity about how technical teams evaluate and buy software.

This is a high-ownership role on an early GTM team. If you enjoy work that directly shapes the pipeline that feeds the business, this would be a great role for you.



WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Pipeline Generation — Drive top-of-funnel pipeline through outbound prospecting, account research, referrals, events, and inbound qualification.

 - Meeting Generation — Secure meetings through personalized, multi-channel outreach — LinkedIn, email, cold calling, events, and creative approaches. Make it worth a busy technical leader's time to respond.

 - Account Research — Build highly targeted prospect lists using modern AI tools like Claude, Clay, and workflow automation platforms. Identify the right people at the right accounts before you reach out.

 - Multi-Channel Campaigns — Execute coordinated outreach campaigns that combine traditional outbound methods with inventive approaches to engage buyers.

 - Strategic Partnership — Partner closely with AEs and leadership on account planning, discovery preparation, and expansion opportunities. Take an active role in shaping strategy — not just executing it.

 - Process Refinement — Surface patterns from prospect conversations that improve targeting and messaging over time. Help refine outbound playbooks as the GTM team scales.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 1+ years in sales, business development, or a customer-facing role

 - Strong written and verbal communication: Your outreach earns attention from people

 - Genuine curiosity about technology and how technical teams evaluate and buy software

 - Organizational discipline and attention to detail; pipeline management is real work

 - Willingness to reach out cold to senior technical stakeholders without hesitation

 - A bias toward experimentation: You test, adjust, and improve

 - Resilient and coachable; you take feedback and use it

 - Experience in SaaS, technology, or startup environments is a plus





THE PERKS

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Free lunch on in-office days (Mon/Tue/Thu)

 - 401(k) with company match, commuter benefits, HSA

 - Up to 4 w

source_jobs.title: Founding Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
OUR MISSION

At Ampersand, we are building scalable integration infrastructure that delivers real-time context to AI agents in seconds. Our declarative platform, 150+ open-source connectors, and embeddable UI components give developers the building blocks they need to ship deep, bidirectional integrations.

We power cutting-edge AI companies like 11x, Orb, Square, and Crunchbase. Almost every engineering team that has evaluated us against other solutions has chosen to use Ampersand. As our product and brand evolve, we're looking for great people to join our experienced team of former Firebase, AWS, Meta and Square engineers and operators.



ABOUT US

Ampersand was founded in 2022 by Ayan Barua and Lauren Long — two engineers and repeat founders with a rare combination of developer tools and SaaS experience. You can learn more about our full team here https://www.withampersand.com/about.

We've raised Series A funding from top-tier investors known for their early-stage bets on generational companies like Anthropic, Apple, Twilio, Supabase, and Vercel.

Together, we believe:

 - This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to build the connectivity infrastructure for AI. Seizing this moment requires passion, hard work, and continuous learning. At the same time, this is a marathon, not a sprint.

 - Velocity comes from great strategic decisions, not doing the 99 things you don't have to do.

 - In five core values that shape how we work every day: Craft, Customer Empathy, Ownership Mindset, Velocity, and Humility.



THE ROLE

We're hiring a Founding Product Manager to take over a product layer that's been founder-owned until now. You'll work alongside the CTO, a founding engineering team, and in close contact with customers to define what gets built, why, and when.

This role requires genuine technical fluency, strong customer instincts, and the ability to operate with minimal structure. If you thrive in cross-functional environments where decisions travel in writing and customer feedback shapes the roadmap, then this role is built for you.

 


WHAT YOU’LL OWN

 - Customer Feedback Loop — Gather requirements, prioritize work, unblock engineers, project-manage delivery, and close the loop with customers when things ship.

 - Connector Experience — Own the product experience for Ampersand connectors — an open-source project that drives the API-specific product features customers depend on.

 - Customer Support — Help manage customer inquiries when questions require product judgment or a deeper understanding of a customer's implementation.

 - Technical Depth — Dive into API documentation or code when needed to understand implementation tradeoffs and push back on decisions that affect the customer experience.

 - API Partnerships — Build partnerships with API providers that have developer ecosystem or partnership programs.

 - Quality & Coverage — Identify opportunities to improve connector quality, reliability, usability, and coverage across the platform.

 - Internal Automation — Use AI tools to build automations and workflows that make the team faster.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 3+ years of product management experience in B2B SaaS, developer tools, infrastructure, or enterprise software

 - You've worked directly alongside engineering teams to ship technical products

 - Technical enough to read API docs, review implementation tradeoffs, and push back on decisions that affect the customer experience

 - Strong customer discovery instincts; you find signal in conversations, not just dashboards

 - Excellent written communication

 - A track record of making prioritization calls and defending them with data and customer context

 - Professional engineering experience is a strong plus.





THE PERKS

 - Competitive salary and equity

 - Medical, dental, and vision insurance

 - Free lunch on in-office days (Mon/Tue/Thu)

 - 401(k) with company match, commuter benefits, HSA

 - Up to 4 weeks PTO

 - Team socials and retreats

notes: Highly technical job postings, with a focus on integration infrastructure and AI. No explicit mention of sponsorship or clearance requirements.
